items.title: The Independent Names Chris Anthony Its President of North American Operations
items.desc: The former Gallery Media Group executive plans to expand lifestyle verticals, events, and creator-led journalism at the digital news brand.

items.desc: The Trade Desk’s chief revenue officer Anders Mortensen is exiting the company after just seven months in the role, ADWEEK has learned.
